findings.message: Mutation parameter 'description' is accepted but never passed to repository.create_item(). The mutation signature advertises that it accepts a description input, but the implementation on line 40 ignores it, passing only 'name'. This creates a contract violation where clients cannot actually set item descriptions despite the API schema promising this capability.
findings.suggestion: Pass the 'description' parameter to repository.create_item(): change line 40 to `return _to_item(repository.create_item(session, name, description))` and verify that repository.create_item() signature accepts description as a parameter.
